Container.Name: ai-comic
Container.Overview: A local UI for building comics with AI image generation. Generates character sheets, outfits, scenes, and composes multi-character panels at correct relative scale. Drives a remote ComfyUI server over the LAN — this container is CPU-only and holds no models.
Container.Requires: A reachable ComfyUI instance with Flux.1 dev, PuLID-Flux, Flux IP-Adapter, Flux Kontext, ControlNet OpenPose + Depth, and the Turnaround Sheet LoRA installed.

Config.Name: WebUI port
Config.Description: Port the Gradio UI binds to.

Config.Name: Config / assets
Config.Description: Persistent storage for settings.json, the SQLite library, and generated images.

Config.Name: Remote ComfyUI URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your ComfyUI instance. The UI will still let you change this from the Settings tab.

Config.Name: ComfyUI auth token
Config.Description: Only needed if ComfyUI is behind a reverse proxy requiring a Bearer token.

Config.Name: Bind host
Config.Description: Host the UI listens on inside the container.

Config.Name: Bind port
Config.Description: Port the UI listens on inside the container. Must match the WebUI port mapping.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User id for file ownership under /config.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group id for file ownership under /config.
